prompt: Generate five distinct 16:10 editorial product-support images for RefusalRail, a forensic RWA agent safety rail. Visual style: Swiss evidence workbench, high-end black/white/red financial safety instrument, ledger paper texture, refusal stamp ink, chain-binding geometry, wallet identity rail, policy circuit breaker, auditor evidence wall. IMPORTANT: do not include readable wallet addresses, fake transaction hashes, fake UI screenshots, or logos. No text except abstract unreadable microtype. Images should be usable as app/deck visual assets, not screenshots. Keep them realistic, premium, and non-stock.
